Package fr.maif

Class IzanamiClient.IzanamiClientBuilder

  • java.lang.Object
    • fr.maif.IzanamiClient.IzanamiClientBuilder
  • Enclosing class:
    IzanamiClient
    public static class IzanamiClient.IzanamiClientBuilder
extends Object

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      IzanamiClient build()
      Build izanami client with this builder current information

    • Method Detail

      • withErrorStrategy

        public IzanamiClient.IzanamiClientBuilder withErrorStrategy​(FeatureClientErrorStrategy errorStrategy)
        Specify error strategy to use for this client. This strategy can be overridden both at query and query feature levels.
        Parameters:
        errorStrategy - error strategy to use when activation status can't be retrieved / computed for a feature
        Returns:
        updated builder

      • withCallTimeout

        public IzanamiClient.IzanamiClientBuilder withCallTimeout​(Duration duration)
        Specify call timeout to use for default HTTP client. This indicates duration after which call to remote Izanami will timeout.
        Parameters:
        duration - timeout before failing remote izanami query
        Returns:
        updated builder

      • withCacheConfiguration

        public IzanamiClient.IzanamiClientBuilder withCacheConfiguration​(FeatureCacheConfiguration cacheConfiguration)
        Specify cache configuration to use fot this client. Cache behaviour may bo overridden both at query and query feature levels.
        Parameters:
        cacheConfiguration - cache configuration
        Returns:
        updated builder

      • withCustomClient

        public IzanamiClient.IzanamiClientBuilder withCustomClient​(IzanamiHttpClient client)
        Specify custom http client to use for this client. this may be usefull if you need to a MTLS or proxy configuration on your izanami calls.
        Parameters:
        client - custom client to use
        Returns:
        updated builder

      • withPreloadedFeatures

        public IzanamiClient.IzanamiClientBuilder withPreloadedFeatures​(Set<String> ids)
        Indicate feature to preload
        Parameters:
        ids - ids of feature to preload
        Returns:
        updated builder

      • withPreloadedFeatures

        public IzanamiClient.IzanamiClientBuilder withPreloadedFeatures​(String... ids)
        Indicate feature to preload
        Parameters:
        ids - ids of feature to preload
        Returns:
        updated builder

      • withBooleanCastStrategy

        public IzanamiClient.IzanamiClientBuilder withBooleanCastStrategy​(BooleanCastStrategy strategy)
        Default strategy to use to cast non-boolean values in boolean when needed. Possible values are STRICT (trying to cast non-boolean value to boolean value will fail) and LAX (empty string, numeric 0 and null are false, everything else is true). This strategy can be overridden both at query and query feature levels.
        Parameters:
        strategy - boolean cast strategy to use
        Returns:
        updated builder

      • build

        public IzanamiClient build()
        Build izanami client with this builder current information
        Returns:
        a new izanami client
